title: Notifications
subtitle: Stay up to date with important events and activity
receiveInBrowser: Receive notifications directly in your browser
inAppAlwaysActive: In-app notifications are always active and cannot be disabled
quietHoursDesc: Set times when you don't want to receive notifications
quietHoursNote: During quiet hours, only urgent notifications will be shown
testDesc: Send a test notification to verify your settings
testBody: Your notification settings are working correctly!
adjustFilters: Try adjusting your search or filters
upToDate: You're up to date! New notifications will show up here.
settingsSoon: Notification preferences will be available in the next update.
preferencesSubtitle: Manage how you receive notifications across different channels and categories
preferencesSaved: Your notification preferences have been updated successfully
enableBrowserDesc: Get real-time alerts even when you're not using the dashboard

categoryDescriptions.orders: Receive updates about order status, new orders, and cancellations
categoryDescriptions.payments: Stay informed about payment transactions, refunds, and failures
categoryDescriptions.reviews: Monitor customer feedback, reviews, and ratings
categoryDescriptions.staff: Manage staff schedules, shifts, and team updates
categoryDescriptions.system: System health, POS connection, and inventory alerts
categoryDescriptions.admin: Administrative alerts for managers and owners only

typeDescriptions.NEW_ORDER: Notified immediately when a new order is received
typeDescriptions.ORDER_UPDATED: Get updates when order details are modified
typeDescriptions.ORDER_READY: Know when orders are ready for pickup or delivery
typeDescriptions.ORDER_CANCELLED: Receive alerts when orders are cancelled
typeDescriptions.PAYMENT_RECEIVED: Receive confirmation when payments are successfully processed
typeDescriptions.PAYMENT_FAILED: Get immediately notified of failed payment attempts
typeDescriptions.REFUND_PROCESSED: Know when refunds have been successfully processed
typeDescriptions.NEW_REVIEW: Be notified when customers leave new reviews
typeDescriptions.BAD_REVIEW: Get urgent alerts for low-rated reviews (1-2 stars)
typeDescriptions.REVIEW_RESPONSE_NEEDED: Reminders for reviews that need your response
typeDescriptions.SHIFT_REMINDER: Receive reminders before your scheduled shifts
typeDescriptions.SHIFT_ENDED: Know when your shift has officially ended
typeDescriptions.NEW_STAFF_JOINED: Be informed when new team members join
typeDescriptions.POS_DISCONNECTED: Critical alerts when POS terminal disconnects
typeDescriptions.LOW_INVENTORY: Alerts when inventory levels fall below threshold
typeDescriptions.FEATURE_UPDATED: Updates about new features and improvements
typeDescriptions.VENUE_SUSPENDED: Critical alerts when venue is suspended
typeDescriptions.HIGH_COMMISSION_ALERT: Alerts for unusually high commission charges
typeDescriptions.REVENUE_MILESTONE: Celebrate when revenue milestones are reached
